_comment: TrustSquare FEA integrity baseline. Refresh ONLY after a confirmed, intentional deploy: python3 fea_integrity_check.py --update-baseline. A same-version byte delta is a tamper/corruption signal, not a deploy.
_note_v170: Preset 2026-06-12 to the v170/v129 Video Tutor deploy target (attended, David-requested). Converges when deploy lands; if deploy is skipped, re-run fea_integrity_check.py --update-baseline against live.
